title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Guest to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Support > App data shows correct Tenant and User info when switching from Guest to unlinked account
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app and use it as a Guest user.
2. Navigate to: Home → Support → App info.
3. Observe the displayed App version, Tenant name/ID, User ID, and Last connected fields.
4. Log in to the app using an account that is not linked to any Tenant.
5. Navigate to: Home → Support → App info.
6. Observe the displayed Account information, Tenant name, and Tenant ID fields.
expected: Step 3: App version is correct, Tenant name/ID and User ID are None, Last connected: unknown. Step 6: Account information is displayed, but Tenant name and Tenant ID are not present.
